body:
Amara, following up on our conversation last week about the [Meridian Grid](companies/meridian-grid) round — I wanted to share that we're moving quickly on our end and expect to have a term sheet drafted by end of next week. I know you mentioned Halfway is still in diligence, so I wanted to give you a heads-up on the timeline so we're not stepping on each other's toes. That said, I think there's real room for us to co-lead here if your conviction is where I think it is — the team's approach to distributed energy resource orchestration is exactly the kind of infrastructure bet both our firms have been leaning into. Let me know if it makes sense to get on a call later this week to align on structure before either of us goes back to the founders.

Tomoko
